Atypical user scenarios and configurations.  Exercises the kernel against user i

1MB body + 1MB summary + deeply nested metadata.

CLI rejects malformed JSON and non-dict JSON cleanly.
A → B → A should be refused. If it's allowed, recompute_ready     could infinite
A task cannot be its own parent.

500 parents, 1 child. Child should not promote until all 500 done.

MANGABA_HOME is a symlink to the real dir. _INITIALIZED_PATHS     uses Path.reso
